title: ClothIQ
description: An AI-powered web application for creating, customizing, and sharing custom apparel designs
keyFeatures: Generate AI-powered apparel designs using OpenAI DALL-E
Customize clothing type, colors, sizes, materials, and fabric textures
AI-powered prompt enhancement for optimized design generation
Multi-step creation workflow: Setup → Generate → Finalize
Community feed to browse, like, and share designs
Authentication, personal dashboard, and collections

title: SaveSpot
description: A personal travel companion app for discovering, saving, and organizing favorite places with location services, collections, and offline support
keyFeatures: Save Places - Add places with photos, notes, and categories
Collections - Organize places into custom collections
Location Services - GPS tagging and map integration
Discovery - Find nearby restaurants, cafes, and parks
Dark/Light Theme - Toggle between themes with full Material 3 support
Image Gallery - Browse and zoom saved photos
Offline Support - All data stored locally with Drift (SQLite)

title: GleamVault
description: A secure and efficient desktop vault application built with .NET MAUI and ASP.NET Core
keyFeatures: Secure Desktop Application: Built with .NET MAUI for native desktop experience on Windows, macOS, and Linux
ASP.NET Core Web API for business logic and data processing
SQL Server for secure and scalable data storage
Secure user management and access control
Efficient CRUD operations with optimized queries
Intuitive and responsive desktop user interface

title: ChartSightAI
description: ChartSightAI is a .NET MAUI mobile app that uses AI to analyze financial charts and generate trade ideas, support/resistance levels, and market insights.
keyFeatures: AI-Powered Chart Analysis – Uses the OpenAI API (via direct HTTP client) to analyze trading chart images and extract structured insights like trends, patterns, and confidence levels
Smart Trade Ideas – Generates actionable trade suggestions with entry, stop-loss, and take-profit levels, backed by AI reasoning
Support & Resistance Detection – Automatically identifies and lists key support/resistance price levels with confidence scores
Secure & Personalized – Includes Supabase-powered user authentication and saves analysis history for personalized, repeatable workflows

title: DE Helper
description: DE Helper Designed to streamline data entry tasks. Instead of repeatedly interacting with a physical POS system, this app allows users to conveniently input data via their smartphone. The collected data can then be exported as an organized Excel sheet, significantly improving workflow efficiency for repetitive data entry tasks.
keyFeatures: Input product information directly from a mobile device
Generate an organized Excel sheet from the entered data
Reduce the need for repetitive physical interaction with the POS system
Designed for ease of use in a work environment
Integrated mobile scanner for quick item identification
Uses Drift for local data persistence

title: IMS-Mobile
description: An offline-first inventory management system for mobile platforms, built with .NET MAUI and Supabase.
keyFeatures: Offline-First Inventory Management: Full CRUD operations (add, edit, delete, search) using SQLite for local storage, with automatic sync to Supabase when online.
Real-Time Dashboard & Analytics: Interactive KPIs, charts, and metrics to monitor stock levels, sales trends, and transaction history at a glance.
Secure Authentication & Data Sync: User login/logout powered by Supabase Auth, with role-aware data access and seamless two-way synchronization between device and cloud.
Professional Reporting & Export: Generate detailed inventory and transaction reports and export them as shareable PDFs directly from the mobile app.
Modern, Responsive UI with Dark Mode: Clean XAML-based interface featuring bottom navigation, consistent theming, and adaptive layouts for all screen sizes.
MVVM Architecture & Clean Code: Built with CommunityToolkit.MVVM, dependency injection, and data binding for maintainable, testable, and scalable code.
Extensible Backend Integration: Full Supabase stack usage—realtime database, REST API, row-level security—for a true full-stack mobile experience.

title: Meal's Calories
description: A Flutter-powered nutrition companion for mindful eating. user-friendly mobile app that helps users log meals, track daily calorie intake, and visualize dietary habits through interactive charts. Built with Flutter and Riverpod for smooth state management, it combines local SQLite persistence with REST API integration to fetch real-time food nutrition data.
keyFeatures: Log meals quickly with support for categories like breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks.
Track daily calorie intake and compare it against personal nutrition goals.
Visualize eating patterns over time with interactive and responsive charts.
Store all meal and nutrition data securely on-device using SQLite for full offline access.
Search a comprehensive food database via REST API to auto-fill nutritional details.
Enjoy a modern, clean, and responsive user interface designed for seamless mobile experience.

title: TaskFlow
description: TaskFlow is a modern task management and productivity application built with Flutter. It helps users organize tasks efficiently, track progress with features like priorities and due dates, and gain insights through visual analytics.
keyFeatures: Task Management: Create, edit, and organize tasks effortlessly
Priorities & Categories: Assign priorities (Low to Urgent) and organize tasks into specific categories
Due Dates & Status Tracking: Monitor deadlines and task progress with clear status indicators
Modern UI: Features a clean design with support for dark/light themes and smooth animations
Analytics: Visualize task distribution and productivity metrics with charts

title: GPT Clone
description: A simple clone of ChatGPT, built with Flutter that mimics the basic functionality of ChatGPT.
keyFeatures: Chat Interface: A user-friendly chat UI that mimics ChatGPT's conversation style, allowing users to send messages and receive AI-generated responses
OpenAI API Integration: The app connects to the OpenAI API to fetch intelligent, context-aware responses using real AI language models
Cross-Platform Support: Built with Flutter, it runs seamlessly on Android, iOS, and the web from a single codebase

Clean Architecture: Uses a well-organized structure with Provider for state management, separation of concerns via models, services, providers, and presentation layers, and reusable widgets for maintainability

title: NeuroPOS
description: NeuroPOS is a .NET MAUI-based, offline-first Point of Sale system with inventory management, sales transactions, cash tracking, and an AI assistant (GPT-4-mini) for smart queries and automation—designed for real-world retail use and built as a senior graduation project.
keyFeatures: Offline-First POS System – Built with .NET MAUI and SQLite for reliable offline operation across mobile and desktop platforms
Inventory & Transaction Management – Add/edit products, track stock in real time, and process sales/purchases with automatic updates.
AI Assistant (GPT-4-mini) – Enables natural language queries, auto-fills product details, and generates reports
Analytics Dashboard – Visual insights on sales (30 days), inventory value (2 months), and cash flow (6 months)
